entries.reason: ITEM_SORT (inventory gather/organize request) is version-absent in gms_v48. The v61 gather sender CWvsContext::SendGatherItemRequest sub_8314D0 @0x8314d0 (GMS_v61.1_U_DEVM.exe, port 13338) has a distinctive shape: if(compartment in [1,5]){ throttle; COutPacket(64)+Encode4(updateTime)+Encode1(compartment) } — and lives in the 0x831xxx secondary CWvsContext send region alongside the sort twin sub_831564. gms_v48 (GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe, port 13337) has NO 0x831xxx region; every inventory send-helper lives in the 0x70dxxx-0x71xxxx cluster that opens the 500ms exclusive-request throttle sub_4A2518 @0x4a2518. A complete enumeration of that throttle's callers (xrefs_to sub_4A2518, 72 refs, no truncation) yields the inventory senders sub_70D8DE(op55 ITEM_MOVE), sub_70D987(drop), sub_70DA60(op66), sub_70DC8D(op117), sub_70DF2F(op60), sub_70E00B(op61), sub_719DD9(op65 USE_ITEM) — NONE carries the [1,5]-compartment-guarded Encode4+Encode1 gather/sort body. The feature's request senders are therefore not implemented in the v48 client. Stage B carried this as flagged-blocked; resolved n-a here with the complete-enumeration decompile evidence. The matching clientbound results (GATHER_ITEM_RESULT/SORT_ITEM_RESULT) are likewise version-absent (no request path to answer).

ITEM_SORT2 (inventory sort request) is version-absent in gms_v48. The v61 sort sender CWvsContext::SendSortItemRequest sub_831564 @0x831564 (GMS_v61.1_U_DEVM.exe, port 13338) is the [1,5]-guarded COutPacket(65)+Encode4(updateTime)+Encode1(compartment) twin of the gather sender in the 0x831xxx region. gms_v48 has no such sender: the complete xrefs_to sub_4A2518 (500ms exclusive-request throttle) enumeration of the 0x70dxxx-0x71xxxx inventory send cluster contains no compartment-guarded Encode4+Encode1 body, and v48 has no 0x831xxx send region. Note the v48 opcode space cannot host the v61 numbering here anyway: v48 op65 is USE_ITEM (sub_719DD9 @0x719dd9, body-verified), not the v61 ITEM_SORT2 slot. Resolved n-a with complete-enumeration decompile evidence (Stage B flag cleared).

CASHSHOP_OPERATION name-change buy arm is version-absent in gms_v48. A func_query name_regex 'NameChange|CheckDuplicate' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no CCashShop name-change send function (only CUISendGifts ctor matches the broader cash-UI regex). The complete list of CCashShop send functions that build COutPacket(160) (the v48 cash-operation dispatcher opcode) is OnBuy@0x44b0cf, OnBuyCouple@0x44b4c1, OnBuyPackage@0x44b837, OnGift@0x44ba5d, OnBuyFriendship@0x44c879, OnBuyNormal@0x44cbb2, OnSetWish@0x44ce9b — none is a name-change buy. The character name-change cash item does not exist in this 2009-era client. The export carried an unresolved stub (address empty, 'function not found in IDB'); stripped here so matrix grading excludes the arm.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION world-transfer buy arm is version-absent from the v48 cash-operation dispatcher. The v48 world-transfer flow is CCashShop::OnBuyTransferWorldItem@0x44c707, which delegates to sub_44FB95@0x44fb95 — and that helper builds COutPacket(20) (a SEPARATE opcode), not COutPacket(160): Encode4+Encode4 on op 20. World transfer is therefore NOT a mode arm of the cash-operation dispatcher in v48; the modeled CashShopOperationBuyWorldTransfer sub-op does not exist under op 160. func_query 'NameChange|...|CheckDuplicate' confirms no SendBuyTransferWorldItemPacket send function exists. The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION enable-equip-slot arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'EnableEquipSlot' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match. The equip-slot-extension purchase in v48 is folded into the friendship-ring buy CCashShop::OnBuyFriendship@0x44c879 (item class 911xxxx / 9110xxx, GetSlotIncDelta, 48-slot cap; send @0x44cadb mode (serial/1000==9110)+5, body pointType(1)+flag(1)+serial(4)) — there is no dedicated OnEnableEquipSlotExt op with the modern pointType+currency+flag+serial shape. The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION increase-character-slot arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'IncCharacterSlot' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match, and the fname is absent from the v48 export entirely (no stub). The complete set of COutPacket(160) send functions in v48 (OnBuy/OnBuyCouple/OnBuyPackage/OnGift/OnBuyFriendship/OnBuyNormal/OnSetWish) contains no character-slot-increase op; the feature does not exist in this client.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION increase-inventory (slot-inc) arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'BuySlotInc' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match. None of the v48 COutPacket(160) send functions (OnBuy/OnBuyCouple/OnBuyPackage/OnGift/OnBuyFriendship/OnBuyNormal/OnSetWish) implements the isPoints+currency+item+inventoryType inventory-slot buy. The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION increase-storage (trunk-inc) arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'IncTrunk' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match. No v48 COutPacket(160) send function implements the isPoints+currency+item storage-slot buy. The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION move-from-cash-inventory (locker-to-slot) arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'MoveCashItem' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match. The v48 cash shop has no cash-inventory transfer ops; none of its COutPacket(160) senders moves a cash item L-to-S (serial(8)+inventoryType(1)+slot(2)). The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION move-to-cash-inventory (slot-to-locker) arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'MoveCashItem' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match (twin of OnMoveCashItemLtoS). The v48 cash shop has no cash-inventory transfer ops. The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

CASHSHOP_OPERATION rebate-locker-item arm is version-absent in gms_v48. func_query name_regex 'RebateLocker' over GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe (port 13337) returns no match. None of the v48 COutPacket(160) send functions implements a locker rebate (ask_SPW + 8-byte locker serial). The export carried an unresolved stub; stripped here.

PLAYER_INTERACTION hired/entrusted-merchant add-to-blacklist arm (OperationMerchantAddToBlackList, modeled body EncodeStr(name) only) is version-absent in gms_v48. A complete enumeration of the v48 opcode-93 (PLAYER_INTERACTION) send-sites (find_bytes '6A 5D' -> 69 push-93 sites, GMS_v48_1_DEVM.exe port 13337) yields only these blacklist senders: CPersonalShopDlg::OnClickBanButton sub_588DFC @0x588ea4 (mode 0x19: Encode1(slot)+EncodeStr(name)), the CPersonalShopDlg auto-reban sub_588F0F @0x588f56 (mode 0x1A: Encode1(slot)+EncodeStr(name)), CPersonalShopDlg::DeliverBlackList sub_588D46 @0x588d77 (mode 0x1B: Encode2(count)+loop EncodeStr), and the CField list-blacklist add/remove sub_4CBD0E/sub_4CBD88 @0x4cbd34/0x4cbdae (modes 0x1C/0x1D: EncodeStr(name)) which are the distinct FieldAddToBlackList/FieldRemoveFromBlackList arms. There is NO CEntrustedShopDlg (hired-merchant) name-only add-to-blacklist send: the entrusted-shop feature that carries this by-name blacklist op does not exist in this 2009-era client. The fname is absent from the v48 export (no stub). Matches the v61 anchor, where this arm is likewise absent (incomplete); v83+ is where the entrusted shop appears.

PLAYER_INTERACTION hired/entrusted-merchant remove-from-blacklist arm (OperationMerchantRemoveFromBlackList, modeled body EncodeStr(name) only) is version-absent in gms_v48. Same complete opcode-93 send-site enumeration as its AddBlackList twin: the only v48 blacklist senders are CPersonalShopDlg (slot+name / count+names) and CField (name-only, = the Field*BlackList arms); no CEntrustedShopDlg name-only delete-from-blacklist send exists. The fname is absent from the v48 export (no stub). Matches the v61 anchor (incomplete); the entrusted shop first appears at v83+.
